rationale.fidelity: Correct pre-window integer staffing, logged inputs, queue mechanism, coverage and lock-in constraints, and expected labor-plus-waiting objective.
rationale.managerial_framing: Uses the supplied recurring cutoff and measured burden to motivate a concrete labor-delay trade-off.
rationale.scholarly_positioning: Explicitly withholds literature-relative novelty and broader generalization.
rationale.evidence_discipline: Accurately scopes logged facts, separates modeled improvement from causal savings, and identifies validation needs.
rationale.prose_clarity: Understandable and precise but template-heavy, jargon-laden, and longer than needed.
rationale.overall: A substantively excellent bounded motivation with strong empirical discipline and some presentational overhead.
